summary: Completed testing of WaveWatch iteration 17 features. All requested features verified working: 1) Playlist detail page shows 'Personnaliser' and 'Partager' buttons for owner. 2) Customization panel has 3 tabs: Couleurs, Icones, Couverture. 3) Icons tab shows 16 emoji options + default icon. 4) Cover tab shows 6 predefined covers (Action, Sci-Fi, Horreur, Romance, Anime, Comedie) + custom URL input with 'Appliquer' button. 5) Inline name editing works via pencil icon. 6) Share button copies URL to clipboard. 7) Public/Private toggle works. 8) VIP theme animations (glow, nav-shimmer, particles, btn-shine, scrollbar) are present in DOM. 9) Neon theme applies pink/cyan gradient border to navbar. 10) Cyberpunk theme shows purple/fuchsia/cyan colors. 11) Backend PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts name, description, icon, is_public fields.
passed_tests: Playlist detail page: 'Personnaliser' button visible for owner (data-testid='customize-btn')
Playlist detail page: 'Partager' button visible for public playlists (data-testid='share-btn')
Playlist detail page: Toggle public/private button works (data-testid='toggle-public')
Customization panel: 3 tabs present - Couleurs, Icones, Couverture
Couleurs tab: 17 color buttons (7 standard + 5 VIP + 5 VIP+)
Icones tab: 16 emoji icons + 1 default icon (17 total)
Icones tab: Clicking icon updates playlist icon immediately
Couverture tab: 6 predefined cover images (Action, Sci-Fi, Horreur, Romance, Anime, Comedie)
Couverture tab: Custom URL input with 'Appliquer' button present
Inline name editing: Pencil icon next to title triggers edit mode
Inline name editing: Enter key saves the new name
Share button: Copies playlist URL to clipboard (toast: 'Lien copie!')
Public/Private toggle: Toggles between Public and Prive states
VIP theme animations: nav-shimmer, glow, particles, btn-shine, scrollbar present in styles
Neon theme: Applies theme-vip, theme-vip-plus, theme-neon classes
Neon theme: Navbar has animated gradient border (pink/cyan/pink)
Cyberpunk theme: Applies theme-cyberpunk class
Cyberpunk theme: Purple/fuchsia/cyan colors visible
Backend: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts name field
Backend: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts description field
Backend: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts icon field
Backend: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts is_public field
Backend: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts color/gradient/animation fields
Backend: PUT /api/playlists/{id}/customize accepts cover_url field (VIP only)
Backend: GET /api/playlists/{id} returns user_info for badge display
critical_code_review_comments: All 16 PLAYLIST_ICONS are properly defined with id, label, and emoji icon
All 6 COVER_PRESETS use TMDB image URLs for genre-specific covers
VIP theme animations CSS is properly injected via ThemeContext.js
Playlist customization endpoint properly validates VIP status for cover_url
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified all playlist customization features: 1) PlaylistDetailPage.js has tabbed customization panel (Couleurs, Icones, Couverture) with 16 emoji icons, 6 cover presets, and custom URL input. 2) Inline name/description editing via pencil icons. 3) Share button copies URL. 4) Public/private toggle. 5) ThemeContext.js has VIP animations (glow on hover, nav-shimmer, particles, btn-shine, scrollbar colors). 6) Backend customize endpoint accepts name, description, icon, is_public, color, gradient, animation, cover_url fields.

features_verified.cover_tab_6_presets: PASS - Action, Sci-Fi, Horreur, Romance, Anime, Comedie
features_verified.cover_custom_url: PASS - URL input with Appliquer button
features_verified.inline_name_editing: PASS - Pencil icon triggers edit mode
features_verified.vip_theme_animations: PASS - nav-shimmer, glow, particles, btn-shine, scrollbar
